headline: T-Mobile Will Survive Threat from SpaceX’s Starlink and Is Best Bet in Wireless
summary: SpaceX  shares fell back to Earth following their blockbuster initial public offering.  T-Mobile has fallen slightly since SpaceX’s IPO in mid-June and is down 8% this year, partly due to worries about competition from Starlink.  Shares of  Verizon  and  AT&T  as well as cable companies  Comcast  and  Charter Communications  have all slid since SpaceX went public.

headline: 150 YEARS AFTER BELL PATENTED THE TELEPHONE, AT&T TO DISCONTINUE LANDLINE ACCESS IN CALIFORNIA
summary: This year marks the 150th anniversary of Alexander Graham Bell's 1876 telephone patent. Now, after a century and a half of continuous telephone service, many Californians have only days remaining to order a traditional copper landline before AT&T plans to stop accepting new orders on July 19, 2026.

headline: H2O AI Super Agent™ is Added by AT&T to Power Enterprise Agentic AI
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., July 14, 2026--H2O AI Super Agent™ is now being used by AT&T in its next phase of agentic AI initiatives and Ask AT&T, deploying autonomous agentic capabilities in workflows across customer experience, fraud prevention, field operations, enterprise research, and intelligent automation.

headline: AT&T (T) Tests 5G Drone Sensing That Points Toward Future 6G Uses
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) and Ericsson completed a live test of advanced 5G network sensing for drone detection. The trial used existing 5G infrastructure with AI-driven algorithms to detect, locate, and track drones in real time. The work targets integrated sensing and communications, a capability often linked with future 6G concepts. AT&T is using this 5G based drone sensing work to show how its network could support security and monitoring uses beyond traditional mobile and broadband services. The...

headline: Bernstein Slashes Targets On VZ, CHTR, T, CMCSA, TMUS Stocks: What’s The SpaceX Connection?
summary: Bernstein slashed the price targets on the five major telecom operators, citing valuation risks tied to SpaceX's plans to launch a direct-to-consumer Starlink mobile service.

headline: Jim Cramer Warns “I Don’t Want to Own AT&T or Verizon” as Starlink Threatens Telecom Stocks
summary: Jim Cramer used his CNBC Mad Dash segment on Monday to warn viewers away from major telecom names after Bernstein published a research note tying valuation risk directly to SpaceX’s Starlink. “This is a Bernstein piece today. Cuts price target, T-Mobile, AT&T, Verizon, Comcast, Charter all because of Space Exploration,” Cramer said, framing the report ... Jim Cramer Warns “I Don’t Want to Own AT&T or Verizon” as Starlink Threatens Telecom Stocks
